name: Southern-Style Honey Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked rice and chopped roasted peanuts. Keep the mixture aside and warm it.
2. In a saucepan, combine the butter and honey. Cook over low heat just until the butter melts.
3. Stir in the cinnamon and ginger into the saucepan.
4. Pour the butter, honey, cinnamon, and ginger mixture over the rice, stirring well to ensure even distribution.
5. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
